parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won')) as active_opps,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won') AND gda_label='PURSUE') as pursue_count,
  (SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value),0)/1000000.0,1) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won') AND gda_label='PURSUE') as pursue_value_m,
  (SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value),0)/1000000.0,1) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won')) as pipeline_m,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE plan_data->>'stage' NOT IN ('Pass')) as active_plans,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND response_deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 30) as deadlines_30d,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)),'[]'::json) FROM (SELECT opp_title, agency, contract_value, plan_data->>'stage' as cap_stage, plan_data->>'pwin' as pwin, plan_data->>'incumbent' as incumbent, plan_data->>'win_strategy' as win_strategy, plan_data->>'discriminators' as discriminators, plan_data->>'eis_strengths' as eis_strengths, plan_data->>'known_competitors' as known_competitors FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE plan_data->>'stage' NOT IN ('Pass') ORDER BY CASE WHEN contract_value ILIKE '%M' THEN REPLACE(contract_value,'M','')::numeric*1000000 ELSE NULLIF(contract_value,'')::numeric END DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 8) t) as top_plans,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(d)),'[]'::json) FROM (SELECT opp_title, agency, response_deadline::date as deadline FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND response_deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 30 ORDER BY response_deadline LIMIT 5) d) as upcoming_deadlines,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(i)),'[]'::json) FROM (SELECT plan_data->>'incumbent' as incumbent, COUNT(*) as opp_count, array_agg(opp_title) as opportunities FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE plan_data->>'incumbent' IS NOT NULL AND plan_data->>'incumbent' NOT IN ('Unknown','Unknown - Research Needed','') AND plan_data->>'stage' NOT IN ('Pass') GROUP BY plan_data->>'incumbent' ORDER BY opp_count DESC) i) as known_incumbents,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(w)),'[]'::json) FROM (SELECT opp_title, plan_data->>'discriminators' as discriminators, plan_data->>'eis_strengths' as eis_strengths, plan_data->>'win_strategy' as win_strategy FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE (plan_data->>'win_strategy' IS NOT NULL AND plan_data->>'win_strategy' != '') AND plan_data->>'stage' NOT IN ('Pass') ORDER BY CASE WHEN contract_value ILIKE '%M' THEN REPLACE(contract_value,'M','')::numeric*1000000 ELSE NULLIF(contract_value,'')::numeric END DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10) w) as win_themes
